summary: Generated 21 work items from `plans/notion-pm-bridge/revisions/r005-approved-plan.md` using companion task input `plans/notion-pm-bridge/revisions/r005-approved-tasks.md`.

tasks.description:
This milestone covers `Phase 1 — Shipping Source of Truth` in the shipping track.

### Why this milestone exists
Ship `Notion PM Bridge` as:

- a public GitHub repository that another developer can understand, run, and contribute to
- a local Codex plugin workflow that proves the repo-first plan-to-Notion execution loop works in practice

Use this release to validate the product on itself: the bridge should manage its own plan, tasks, Notion workspace, and execution path well enough that we can ship from the same system we are building.

### Phase estimate
- ``0.5-1.5 focused days``

### PM expectation
- use this phase to track release readiness, not only code output
- child tasks should make the public-share path understandable from Notion alone
tasks.title: Phase 1 — Shipping Source of Truth

tasks.description:
This shipping task belongs to `Phase 1 — Shipping Source of Truth`.

### Why this matters
create and lock the repo-facing shipping docs that describe what this bridge is shipping now

### Release goal alignment
Ship `Notion PM Bridge` as:

- a public GitHub repository that another developer can understand, run, and contribute to
- a local Codex plugin workflow that proves the repo-first plan-to-Notion execution loop works in practice

Use this release to validate the product on itself: the bridge should manage its own plan, tasks, Notion workspace, and execution path well enough that we can ship from the same system we are building.

### Task goal
one approved source of truth for the release

### Validation
- human review of `docs/shipping_plan.md` and `docs/shipping_tasks.md`

### Parallelization
serial anchor for all later shipping work.

### Done means
- the shipped behavior and public docs both reflect the task outcome
- the release plan can advance without hidden repo-only assumptions

### Tracking code
- `P1.1`
tasks.title: P1.1 Approve shipping plan and task sheet
